user_goal: 按 MVP PRD §12 路线图在 B006 Global ETF Momentum 与 B010 Risk Parity Backtest MVP 基础上实现 Master Portfolio Allocation MVP：组合两个 core sleeves（momentum 40% + risk parity 30%）并预留 satellite interface stubs（US quality 20% + HK-China 10%）、季度再平衡 workflow、账户级 15% drawdown kill-switch（冻结非防御性增仓 + human-review-required clearance）、组合层 reports 含 calculated baseline（吸收 BL-B010-S2），同时保持 fixture/mock-first CI、snapshot/data-quality semantics 和 no-live/no-secret/no-network-by-default/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI safety guards。

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-13: Closed B010 done wrap-up (added BL-B010-S1 / BL-B010-S2 to backlog, session_notes refreshed). User confirmed next batch direction: B011 Portfolio Allocation and Risk MVP per MVP PRD §12 + docs/strategy/00-master-portfolio-allocation.md. Decisions captured: (1) two core sleeves implemented + satellite interface stubs reserved, (2) quarterly Master rebalance with monthly cadence noted as future option, (3) 15% drawdown kill-switch freezes new non-defensive exposure + requires explicit clearance + emits human_review_required flag (recommended by planner, accepted by user), (4) BL-B010-S2 absorbed into B011 F004 calculated baseline. Wrote B011 spec and features.json (6 features: F001-F005 generator + F006 codex). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-13: F001 completed. Added trade/portfolio/master.py with MasterSleeveConfig, MasterPortfolioParameters, validate_master_portfolio_parameters, default_master_portfolio_parameters. Defaults: momentum (impl, global_etf_momentum, 0.40) + risk_parity (impl, risk_parity_vol_target, 0.30) + satellite_us_quality (stub, 0.20) + satellite_hk_china (stub, 0.10), defensive_asset=SGOV, rebalance_frequency=quarterly, drawdown_threshold=0.15, max_exposure=1.0, human_review_required_on_trigger=True. Validation rejects leverage, non-quarterly rebalance, drawdown outside (0,1), empty/duplicate sleeves, unknown sleeve_type, implemented-without-strategy_id, satellite_stub-with-strategy_id, non-positive planning_weight, and sum != 1.0. tests/unit/test_master_portfolio_config.py covers all paths. Full checks pass: pytest (109), ruff, compileall, mypy. Next: F002 quarterly rebalance workflow.
